CustomField.formula: if(ISPICKVAL( HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c, 'Mobile or Manufactured Home'),0,HOMEtracker__List_Price__c * Municipality_Name__r.General_Tax_Rate__c * Municipality_Name__r.Equalization_Ratio__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is auto-calculated as follows: "List Price" (from the Property) x "General Tax Rate" (from the Municipality) x "Equalization Ratio" (from the Municipality).
CustomField.label: Annual Property Taxes (Approximate)
